description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:stable-slim Docker image, sets the DEBIAN_FRONTEND variable to noninteractive, and runs apt-get update as a before_script for all jobs. Define two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that installs libc6-dev gcc make python3-numpy python3-dev python3-setuptools and then executes python3 setup.py build_ext --inplace. In the deploy stage add a release job that only runs on tag pipelines, installs python3-numpy python3-setuptools python3-pypandoc twine, echoes the SHARED_ARRAY_VERSION variable (set to $CI_COMMIT_TAG) into a .version file, builds a source distribution with python3 setup.py sdist, and uploads the resulting dist/* artifacts to PyPI using twine upload.
